author: Deluged
text:
§16 base doctor — core-owned drift audit

Add the base half of the doctor read op (§16): audit only core-owned structure and name, per finding, the existing verb that fixes it — there is no repair verb. Checks: stale change worktrees (git worktree remove), unresolved operating/ (bl prime), a committed-but-uninstalled bin/ dangle and protocol-version drift (bl install), and a circular blockers cycle across tasks/ (bl update). Plugins audit their own territory via the doctor hook dirs, unchanged.

doctor::audit takes an injected protocol probe so it stays a pure, testable read; the edge passes plugin::describe. Adds Registry::wired() — the whole-registry enumeration the bin/ dangle and drift checks iterate. EffectiveConfig (§4) is the one listed base check deferred until config layering lands; the audit gains it then with no shape change.
